Sparebanken Vest ( (SPIZF) ) has shared an update.

Sparebanken Vest has announced a reduction in mortgage and deposit rates by up to 0.25 percentage points following a decrease in the key policy rate by Norges Bank. data.title: HS Optimus Subsidiary Secures A$7.05 Million Loan for Asset Enhancement
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

HS Optimus Holdings Limited ( (SG:504) ) has issued an update.

HS Optimus Holdings Limited announced that its subsidiary, Ambertree Vic Mel (Lincoln) Pty Ltd, has entered into a loan agreement for A$7.05 million with an Australian asset manager. The loan, which carries an interest rate of 8.49% per annum and is secured by a legal first charge over a property in Melbourne, will be used to capitalize on potential opportunities related to the Lincoln Square asset, including investment in student accommodation planning permits. This financial move is expected to support the company’s strategic asset monetization efforts and enhance its market positioning.

More about HS Optimus Holdings Limited

HS Optimus Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in Singapore, operating through its subsidiaries. The company is involved in managing and investing in assets, with a focus on opportunities that enhance asset value, particularly in the real estate sector.

data.title: KRP Development Holdings Reports Decline in Annual Financial Performance
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An update from KRP Development Holdings Limited ( (HK:2421) ) is now available.

KRP Development Holdings Limited reported a significant decline in its financial performance for the year ended 31 March 2025. The company’s revenue decreased by 20%, and profit before taxation fell by 38%, primarily due to increased valuation losses on investment properties and a substantial drop in impairment losses on inventories. The profit attributable to equity shareholders halved, and no final dividend per share was declared, indicating a challenging year for the company and potential concerns for stakeholders.

More about KRP Development Holdings Limited

KRP Development Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating primarily in the real estate sector. The company focuses on property development and investment, with a market presence that includes managing investment properties and handling inventories.

data.title: SSAB Postpones Luleå Steel Mill Commissioning by 12 Months
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

SSAB Corporation ( ($SE:SSAB.A) ) just unveiled an update.

SSAB has announced a 12-month postponement in the commissioning of its new steel mill in Luleå due to delays in the reinforcement of the transmission grid by Vattenfall Eldistribution. The delay, which shifts the start-up from the end of 2028 to the end of 2029, is due to technical challenges faced by Svenska kraftnät in modernizing the existing grid. Despite the delay, the investment framework of 4.5 billion euros remains unchanged, and SSAB is in dialogue with stakeholders to ensure a sustainable project plan moving forward.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:SSAB.A) stock is a Hold with a SEK56.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SSAB Corporation stock, see the SE:SSAB.A Stock Forecast page.

More about SSAB Corporation

SSAB is a Nordic and US-based steel company known for producing value-added steel products and services aimed at creating a stronger, lighter, and more sustainable world. The company is a leader in developing fossil-free steel and has a significant focus on reducing carbon emissions in its operations. SSAB operates production facilities in Sweden, Finland, and the US, and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm with a secondary listing on Nasdaq Helsinki.

Average Trading Volume: 1,218,493

Current Market Cap: SEK56.37B
